properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v5 v4

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: We stand here together As a family we join hands together Lifting praises to the Father above, For sending His Son

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: We’ve chosen together As a family to serve Him forever Knowing nothing else will matter in time We’ve made up our minds!

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Through the heat of the day we will join in the fight Till He takes us away, Till our faith becomes sight As for me and my house, we will serve the Lord

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Choose you this day, tell me whom will you serve? Let nothing stand in your way, Give the praise He deserves As for me and my house, we will serve the Lord

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: We will serve Him We will serve Him We will serve Him For He is worthy
